category_sources: source_facts.description says "Tunnel TCP connections over the Tox protocol"; official README documents server/client tunneling over the Tox overlay network.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is "tuntox"; official GitHub repository and README use the tuntox name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains server and client usage sections and links to the official FAQ file.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/gjedeer/tuntox; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TCP tunneling over Tox; official GitHub topics include nat, p2p, tox, toxcore, tunneling, and tox-protocol.
